name: multi_grep
description: Search for multiple pipe-separated patterns in one call with automatic exclusion of noise directories (node_modules, __pycache__, .git, vendor, .venv, dist, build). Supports file-type filtering, context lines, max output limiting, and optional exclusion of test files and .d.ts files. Use --no-exclude to search inside node_modules or other normally-excluded directories.
when_to_use: Use when you need to search for several related patterns across a project. Replaces 2-4 separate grep calls and avoids manually piping through multiple grep -v exclusions for noise directories. The --no-tests and --no-dts flags further reduce noise from irrelevant files. Use --include to restrict to specific file extensions. To search inside node_modules for library type definitions, use --no-exclude --include '*.d.ts' to override the automatic exclusions.

parameters.name: patterns
parameters.description: Pipe-separated regex patterns to search for (e.g., 'parseJsonSchema|jsonSchemaToType').

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: File path or directory to search.

parameters.name: --include
parameters.description: Comma-separated file globs to include (e.g., '*.ts,*.js'). Use '*.d.ts' with --no-exclude to search type definitions.

parameters.name: --no-exclude
parameters.description: Disable automatic exclusion of noise directories. Use this to search inside node_modules, .git, etc. Combine with --include '*.d.ts' for type definition searches.

parameters.name: --context/-C
parameters.description: Number of context lines before/after each match (default: 0).

parameters.name: --max/-m
parameters.description: Maximum number of matches to show (default: 60).

parameters.name: --file-only/-l
parameters.description: Only show filenames, not matching lines.

examples.expected: Lines matching any pattern in .ts files under ark/, excluding test files, .d.ts files, and noise directories.
Up to 20 matches of TODO/FIXME/HACK in .py and .ts files, excluding noise directories.
Lines matching 'enumerated' with 2 lines of context, excluding test files.
Finds the FindOptions interface definition in mikro-orm type declarations, searching inside node_modules with no exclusions.
Searches for all three patterns in mikro-orm core type definitions, useful when implementing cursor pagination or custom queries.

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces 2-4 separate grep calls (one per pattern) and eliminates the need to pipe through multiple grep -v exclusions for noise directories. The automatic exclusion of node_modules, __pycache__, .git, vendor, etc. prevents token waste from irrelevant results. The --no-tests and --no-dts flags further reduce output volume by filtering out test files and type declarations that are rarely the target of source-code searches. The --no-exclude flag combined with --include '*.d.ts' replaces 5-15+ separate find/grep/ls steps when searching for library type definitions in node_modules, which is a common pattern when implementing new features against third-party APIs.
